zh: 0-6歲兒童的教育決定了這個孩子的一生、
en: that education from age zero to six determines a child's whole life.
This is true for typical families,
and single-parent families need to take it even more seriously.

zh: 由於單親家庭的成員總是少了一位、
en: Because a single-parent household is always missing one member,

zh: 在性別教育上會有所缺失、
對小孩的示範作用較不完全、
en: and role modeling is less complete.

zh: 所以單親家庭中的父母對孩子的教育需要特別注意。
en: So single parents must pay extra attention to their child's upbringing.
